nasb.text: and a tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering for each lamb, for a burnt offering of a soothing aroma, an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: and a tenth of fine flour mixed with oil as a grain offering for every lamb; for a burnt offering with a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 為每隻公羊羔，要獻一公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；這是馨香的燔祭，是獻給耶和華的火祭。

ccb.text: 每只公羊羔需献一公斤素祭。这馨香的燔祭是献给耶和华的火祭。
